name: agentils-vscode
description: AgentILS (Intelligent Logical System) — single-billing multi-turn human-in-the-loop for Copilot Chat

languageModelTools.name: agentils_request_user_clarification
languageModelTools.modelDescription: **User clarification**: Ask the human developer for input or guidance. Give your question context in the chat, then use human intelligence to request input from the human.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Allows the agent to request clarification or guidance from the user through AgentILS.

question.description: The question to ask the user

context.description: Optional context information to help the user understand the question

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the input field

languageModelTools.name: agentils_request_contact_user
languageModelTools.modelDescription: **Contact user**: Proactively contact the human. Provide enough context so the human understands why contact is needed.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Allows the agent to contact the user through AgentILS when immediate input is needed.

question.description: The urgent message or question to communicate to the user

context.description: Context explaining why immediate contact is needed

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the input field

languageModelTools.name: agentils_request_user_feedback
languageModelTools.modelDescription: **User feedback**: Ask the human for their opinion, rating, or suggestions about the process or result. Provide clear context so the human knows what aspect to evaluate.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Allows the agent to request user feedback through AgentILS.

question.description: The feedback question to ask the user

context.description: Summary of what was completed, to help user provide relevant feedback

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the input field

languageModelTools.name: agentils_request_dynamic_action
languageModelTools.modelDescription: **Dynamic action**: A universal tool that supports multiple action types (clarification, contact, feedback) in a single interface. Use 'action' to specify the type and 'params' for the parameters. This reduces system prompt context usage while providing the same functionality.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Allows the agent to execute multiple user interaction actions through one AgentILS interface.

action.description: The action type to perform (e.g., 'createPlanFile', or custom action types)

params.description: Parameters for the action. Can contain any properties needed by the action.

agentils.mcp.autoStart.description: Auto-start a local MCP server on extension activation.

agentils.mcp.heartbeatTimeoutMs.description: How long the local MCP server keeps a pending interaction alive without heartbeat, in milliseconds.

agentils.mcp.sweepIntervalMs.description: How often the local MCP server checks for expired pending interactions, in milliseconds.

agentils.webview.viewColumn.description: Where AgentILS opens its webview panel.

agentils.webview.appendAttachmentContent.description: Whether AgentILS webview responses should append attachment content when supported by the webview.

agentils.webview.hostHeartbeatMs.description: How often the VS Code extension host refreshes pending interaction heartbeat while the AgentILS panel is open, in milliseconds.

agentils.templates.global.description: Global AgentILS reply templates. Each template should contain 'name' and 'template'. Use {{INPUT_CONTENT}} as the placeholder.

template.description: Template content using {{INPUT_CONTENT}} as the placeholder

agentils.templates.clarification.description: AgentILS reply templates for clarification requests.

template.description: Template content using {{INPUT_CONTENT}} as the placeholder

agentils.templates.contact.description: AgentILS reply templates for contact-user requests.

template.description: Template content using {{INPUT_CONTENT}} as the placeholder

agentils.templates.feedback.description: AgentILS reply templates for feedback requests.

template.description: Template content using {{INPUT_CONTENT}} as the placeholder
